channels.label: Chandigarh Administration - official portal
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Administration (official UT portal)
channels.note: Official website of the Chandigarh Administration. Fetched and read 2026-07-15.

channels.label: LokSamadhan - Unified Grievance Portal, Chandigarh (UT)
channels.source_name: LokSamadhan - Unified Grievance Portal of Administrator, Chandigarh (UT)
channels.note: Self-described as 'Unified Grievance Portal of Administrator, Chandigarh (UT)', hosted on the government chd.gov.in domain. Register with a mobile number, lodge and track grievances. Site may present a TLS chain warning in some clients.

channels.label: LokSamadhan grievance portal support (Dept. of Information Technology)
channels.source_name: LokSamadhan - Contact Us section
channels.note: Published on the LokSamadhan portal 'Contact Us': Department of Information Technology, Additional Deluxe Building, Sector 9, Chandigarh. This is portal support, not a 24x7 helpline.

channels.label: Women & Child Helpline (Chandigarh Police)
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - official website helpline panel
channels.note: Published under 'For Crime Against Women & Children - Dial 112 or Women & Child Helpline No. 1091'.

channels.label: Chandigarh Police - citizen portal
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police (official)
channels.note: Official Chandigarh Police site: complaint registration, FIR copy download, case status, tenant/servant verification.

channels.label: Chandigarh Police - online complaint registration
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - Complaint Registration page
channels.note: Describes how to file a complaint and lists the Police Control Room numbers plus contacts for police stations/posts and senior officers.

channels.label: Chandigarh Police Control Room
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - Complaint Registration page
channels.note: Published verbatim: 'one may call the Chandigarh Police Control Room No. 112 or 0172-2749194 or 0172-2744100'.

channels.label: Chandigarh Police Control Room (alternate)
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - Complaint Registration page
channels.note: Second control-room number published on the same page.

channels.label: Deaf & mute emergency WhatsApp (Chandigarh Police)
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - official website
channels.note: Published as 'For Deaf & Dumb Whatsapp Number 8699300112'. WhatsApp only.

channels.label: Chandigarh Cyber Crime Cell
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - official website helpline panel
channels.note: Published as 'Dial - 0172 - 2970400, 2970600' for cyber crime complaints. Alternate: 01722970600.

channels.label: Senior Citizens Helpline (Chandigarh Police)
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - official website helpline panel
channels.note: Published as 'For any Senior Citizens Complaint - Dial 112 or Senior Citizens Helpline No. 1090'. Caution: the district administration site labels the same number 1090 as 'All India Crime Stopper'. Both are official sources; the label differs.

channels.label: Special Cell for protection of run-away couples (Chandigarh Police)
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Police - official website helpline panel
channels.note: Published as 'Dial - 70871 16999 or Dial - 112'. A separate 'Protection of Run-Away Couples Helpline 9855702356' is also listed on the same panel.

channels.label: District Administration Chandigarh - district portal
channels.source_name: District Administration Chandigarh (NIC)
channels.note: Chandigarh UT comprises a SINGLE district, so there is no multi-district directory page. This NIC site is the district's own website (the equivalent of a district listing). Includes e-District services, Right to Service, citizen charter.

channels.label: Deputy Commissioner Office, Chandigarh
channels.source_name: District Administration Chandigarh - Contact Us
channels.note: Deputy Commissioner Office, Sector 17, Chandigarh (UT) - 160017.

channels.label: Chandigarh Administration - official helpline directory
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Administration - Helpline page
channels.note: Directory of hospital, police station, fire station and transport numbers. CAUTION: this page appears stale (it still lists Jet Airways, defunct since 2019) and most numbers are 7-digit local numbers with no 0172 STD code printed. Treat individual landline entries with care.

channels.label: Election Helpline, Chandigarh
channels.source_name: District Administration Chandigarh (NIC) - 'Helpline Numbers' panel
channels.note: Also published on https://chandigarh.gov.in/helpline under 'Others - Election Helpline 1950'.

channels.label: Chandigarh Power Distribution Ltd (CPDL) - electricity billing & complaints
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Power Distribution Limited (CPDL) - official discom site
channels.note: CPDL is the licensed electricity distribution company for Chandigarh. This is the discom's own site, not a .gov.in domain - no central .gov.in page publishing these numbers was found.

channels.label: CPDL electricity 24x7 call centre
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Power Distribution Limited (CPDL) - official discom site
channels.note: CPDL's own homepage states '24x7 Call Center: 19121, +91 9240216666. Email: connectcpdl@rpsg.in'. Confidence lower than the police/administration numbers: the site is JavaScript-rendered and this string was read from the page's own metadata rather than rendered body text.

channels.label: CPDL electricity call centre / WhatsApp
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Power Distribution Limited (CPDL) - official discom site
channels.note: Confirmed twice on CPDL's own site: in the page metadata and in the site's structured organisation data, which tags '+91 9240216666' as contactType 'customer service'.

channels.label: Sampark - Chandigarh online payments (electricity/water bills, property tax)
channels.source_name: Chandigarh Administration homepage ('Pay Electricity/Water Bills/Property Tax' link)
channels.note: Linked directly from the Chandigarh Administration homepage. Note this link is served over plain HTTP on the government site.

channels.label: National Emergency Number (ERSS) - Police, Fire & Rescue, Health
channels.source_name: Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
channels.note: MHA's single pan-India emergency number: 'ONE INDIA ONE EMERGENCY NUMBER 112', a nationwide unified emergency response system. Works in every State/UT. Corroborated by india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 112 as the Integrated Helpline (ERSS) covering Police, Fire & Rescue and Health services.

channels.label: Fire Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed under 'Emergency Numbers' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: National Ambulance Service (NAS)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Ambulance Service (NAS)' under Emergency Numbers on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Women Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Women Helpline Toll free No. - 181' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed on india.gov.in as both 'Women Helpline Number' and 'Domestic Violence Helpline'.

channels.label: National Commission for Women (NCW) 24x7 Helpline
channels.source_name: National Commission for Women (NCW)
channels.note: NCW's own site states: 'Call the 24x7 NCW helpline at 14490 for immediate assistance and support', and lists 'NCW Women Helpline (14490)' under its Complaint Redressal cells. IMPORTANT: the india.gov.in helpline directory still lists 7827170170 as the 'National Commission for Women Helpline' - that number appears nowhere on ncw.gov.in (not even in raw HTML), so it appears stale and was deliberately omitted in favour of the department's own current number.

channels.label: Child Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Child Helpline Toll free No. - 1098' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed as 'Child Help Line' on india.gov.in.

channels.label: Elderline - National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)
channels.source_name: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Elder Helpline: 14567' on the Department of Social Justice & Empowerment's own Elderline site, which the ministry homepage links to as the 'National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)'. india.gov.in additionally lists a landline 011-20893999 alongside 14567 for the Senior Citizens Helpline.

channels.label: National Consumer Helpline (NCH)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Consumer Helpline (NCH)' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026). Note: the NCH portal consumerhelpline.gov.in could not be reached at time of research (DNS resolves to an NIC address but the host refused connections / returned 504), so only the number is cited here - not the NCH portal URL.

channels.label: Cyber Crime Helpline (online financial fraud reporting)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Confirmed on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal homepage banner (MHA / Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre - I4C), which reads: 'To report online financial fraud, call 1930' and 'register your complaint at cybercrime.gov.in'. Independently corroborated by the india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 1930 as the Cyber Crime Helpline.

channels.label: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal (file a cybercrime complaint)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Verified live. Ministry of Home Affairs portal for reporting cybercrime; supports anonymous reporting, women/children-related crime, financial fraud and other cybercrime, plus complaint tracking. Nationwide.

channels.label: CPGRAMS - Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System
channels.source_name: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, Government of India
channels.note: Verified live; this is the citizen-facing portal. The site states CPGRAMS is 'an online platform available to the citizens 24x7 to lodge their grievances to the public authorities on any subject related to service delivery... a single portal connected to all the Ministries/Departments of Government of India and States.' Supports tracking by registration ID and an appeal facility. Note: it does not cover RTI matters, subjudice/court matters, or religious matters.

channels.label: Central Vigilance Commission - lodge a corruption complaint
channels.source_name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), Government of India
channels.note: Verified live. CVC's Complaint Management System with a 'Citizen Login', complaint status tracking and a published complaint handling policy. Linked from cvc.gov.in as 'Lodge a complaint'. Covers corruption complaints against central government organisations.

channels.label: Relief Commissioner for Natural Calamities
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Road Accident Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).
